mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.semester, t.teacher_id as teacherId, t.course_id as courseId, t.class_id as classId, it.name as teacherName, ic.course_name as courseName, sc.class_name as className FROM info_teaching t LEFT JOIN info_teacher it ON t.teacher_id = it.id LEFT JOIN info_course ic ON t.course_id = ic.id LEFT JOIN sys_class sc ON t.class_id = sc.id WHERE t.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT id, teacher_id as teacherId, course_id as courseId, class_id as classId, semester FROM info_teaching WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO info_teaching ( teacher_id, course_id, class_id, semester, create_time, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{teacherId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{semester}, NOW(), 0 )
